title: MusicGallery
description: This mod adds custom music discs based on user submissions
body:
This mod improves your experience with fan-sourced songs and personalized music discs that can be played in a jukebox in-game.

Do you have a personal song you want in the game? Join our Discord and share it! I will review submissions when I have time and the energy for it. Your song could be included in a future update.

The current music disc included is:
- FEIN!

More discs are coming soon.

Here is the link to submit your song: https://discord.gg/SXB5rmzY

If you’d like, I can also briefly list features or something else exciting. Just let me know what vibe you want serious, fun, chaotic, eerie DJ, or something else.
